attacking_style: Not a primary attacker; functions as a high-altitude domestique who sets tempo on climbs rather than launching decisive moves himself.
team_tactics: Deployed as a protected GC option when team hedges with dual leadership strategies, or as a climbing domestique setting tempo for team leaders on final ascents.
terrain_preference: Mountain stages where sustained tempo-setting is required; capable of finishing top-10 GC in stage races when given protected status.
vulnerability: Limited observations suggest he lacks the explosive finishing power to contest GC wins when facing pure climbers; relies on team tactical decisions for role definition.
key_patterns: Functions in dual roles: GC protection rider or climbing domestique depending on team strategy (2 instances).
Demonstrates early-season form reliability, showing race-ready fitness in February-March window (2 races).
Excels at controlled tempo-setting work on climbs for team leaders rather than personal attacks (2 observations).
form_trajectory: neutral: Showed consistent form across 2018-2020 window but limited recent data; maintained GC capability and domestique utility without notable progression
